args.code: (async function(){let n=0;const t0=performance.now();await new Promise(r=>{const l=()=>{n++;if(performance.now()-t0<2500)requestAnimationFrame(l);else r();};requestAnimationFrame(l);});const mc=window.__mc;return JSON.stringify({fps:Math.round(n/2.5),errs:(window.__errs||[]),chunks:mc?mc.chunkManager.meshedCount:-1,workerErrs:mc?mc.chunkManager.workerErrors:-1,pos:mc?[mc.body.x.toFixed(1),mc.body.y.toFixed(1),mc.body.z.toFixed(1)]:null});})()
